entities.name: Hedging Phrases
entities.context: Communication anti-pattern V avoids - softening language like 'if you're interested', 'no rush', 'whenever you have time'

entities.name: Direct Communication
entities.context: V's preferred communication style - making clear asks with specific times and confident framing

relationships.context: V advocates replacing hedging with direct requests and specific asks
Hedging is the anti-pattern; directness is the replacement pattern
